items.title: Woman fights to have ex-policeman husband kept behind bars

items.title: 'Significant errors' in 'preventable' death of baby in murder-suicide

items.title: Kangaroo Island declared feral pig-free after more than two centuries

children.content: Devastating bushfires provide Kangaroo Island with a unique silver lining as it becomes the largest island in the world to eradicate feral pigs.

items.title: Wildlife carers did not expect to be 'ground zero' for third H5 bird flu case

children.content: A South Australian wildlife rescue group is working with local authorities after Australia's third confirmed case of H5 bird flu was detected in a migratory bird.

articles.title: Deadly bird flu discovered in second Australian state

children.content: A third confirmed case of the deadly H5 bird flu has been found in a migratory bird on Australia's southern coast.

image.altText: Warnings a much deadlier strain of avian influenza could arrive this spring

articles.title: Australia's mammals are at risk of bird flu. This is what we know

children.content: While birds are the most likely victims of the deadly strain of bird flu, researchers are also sounding the alarm for native mammals and marsupial species. These are some of the steps being taken to protect them.

items.title: Nose landing gear failure could have caused fatal plane crash, ATSB says

children.content: A plane crash that killed two people and injured several others in Adelaide earlier this year could have been caused by a failure in the plane's nose landing gear, an ongoing investigation has found.

items.title: SA pushes for AI data centres as industry says it's not asking for subsidies

items.title: Adelaide man 'not criminally responsible' for housemate's murder, court finds

items.title: Residents worried about dramatic increase to Menindee Lakes water release

children.content: Residents living along the Darling River are worried the decision to double water releases from the Menindee Lakes will remove the system's drought reserve. But authorities say it will help rebuild populations of Murray cod downstream.

articles.title: Who is going to qualify for the World Cup knockout rounds?

children.content: The Socceroos will finish either second of third in their World Cup group. Second means qualification for the knockout rounds. Third is a bit more complicated.

items.title: As Ebola spreads, Australia faces rise in 'biblical' disease risks

items.title: Sydney, Melbourne to lead price falls in 'fragmented' market

items.title: Mobile CT scanner visits region where 'at least one smoker in every house'
